name: Garden Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the quartered potatoes in a single layer in a large roasting pan. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
2. In a bowl, combine 1/4 cup olive oil and minced garlic.
3. Drizzle the mixture over the potatoes. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and lightly browned. Allow them to cool.
4. With a sharp knife, remove the corn kernels from the cobs. Toss together the cooled potatoes, diced tomato, cucumber, green pepper, corn kernels, and sliced green onions.
5. In a blender or food processor, blend the white vinegar, remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil, sugar, and cilantro leaves until smooth.
6. Pour the blended dressing over the vegetable mixture and toss to coat evenly. Season with salt to taste.
7. Chill for several hours before serving to allow flavors to develop.
Each serving contains about: 124 calories; 26 mg sodium; 0 cholesterol; 5 grams fat; 18 grams carbohydrates; 2 grams protein; 0.62 gram fiber.
